flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Austin Peay State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Austin Peay State University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (23.2% → 27.3%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Austin Peay State University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (62.9% → 70.0%).
